corrections.text: The article attributes a direct quote to Verdict — rival cloud services "must also be given access on equal terms to the same hardware and software features that are available to Apple's own iCloud service." The verdict.co.uk page returned HTTP 403 and could not be archived or verified verbatim. The equivalent verified passage in the Advanced Television report reads that providers are "given access under equal conditions to the same hardware and software features as those available to Apple's iCloud." The substance — the Article 6(7) equal-access requirement — is fully corroborated; only the exact quoted wording attributed to Verdict is unverified.
